title: Sign off the fabrication stackup with the vendor
description: Confirm the fabricator's actual layer heights and impedance results match the design intent before mass production.
body: Use when moving from prototype to a production fabrication run. Do not assume the fab builds exactly the designed stackup, since material availability shifts dielectric heights. Actions: request the fab's proposed stackup, compare impedance results against the design target, and adjust trace geometry if the dielectric differs. Validation signals include a vendor impedance report within tolerance and a stackup drawing matching the design intent. Risk boundary: a silent dielectric substitution shifts impedance out of spec, so escalate any stackup deviation before authorizing the run.
